name: Perplexity
description: An AI research tool for rapid market scans, competitor summaries, trend exploration, and source-backed starting points for strategic analysis.
whyUseIt: Perplexity helps founders move faster through the early research phase of strategy work, especially when they need a quick picture of markets, competitors, or emerging shifts before going deeper.
aiCapabilities: Perplexity generates source-backed summaries, follow-up research paths, comparison tables, and quick briefs that accelerate strategic scanning and synthesis.
